entities.name: Meeting Quality Indicators
entities.context: Framework for evaluating meeting success with positive and negative signals

entities.name: Full Duration
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - no early exit indicates engagement

entities.name: Substantive Product Feedback
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - meaningful feedback provided during meeting

entities.name: Reciprocal Value Offer
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - counterparty offers ongoing availability for feedback

entities.name: Shared Domain Language
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - common vocabulary in higher ed, product, or technical domains

entities.name: Personal Connection
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - rapport established through personal topics like cats or fatherhood

entities.name: Clear Next Steps
entities.context: Positive meeting signal - agreed actions coming out of meeting

entities.name: Higher Ed
entities.context: Domain sector mentioned as shared language area
